extension_status: predeclared cross-model replication before downloading the checkpoint, generating SmolLM2 answers, or inspecting any SmolLM2 aggregate score
label_definition: 1 = greedy answer contains no normalized accepted answer alias

crcv_mean.formula: mean over complete trailing windows of sample-SD(p_t × r_t)
crcv_mean.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

crcv_max.formula: max over complete trailing windows of sample-SD(p_t × r_t)
crcv_max.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

mean_nll.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

confidence_variance_mean.formula: mean over trailing windows of sample-SD(p_t)
confidence_variance_mean.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

shift_variance_mean.formula: mean over trailing windows of sample-SD(r_t)
shift_variance_mean.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

answer_tokens.formula: number of tokens in the greedy answer
answer_tokens.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

top3_token_surprise.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

worst_token_surprise.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

surprise_spread.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

top4_token_surprise.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

skip_first_top3_surprise.formula: mean(largest 3 values of −ln p_t for t > 1)
skip_first_top3_surprise.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

surprise_shift_top3.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

uncertainty_shift_top3.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

token_entropy_top3.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

token_entropy_mean.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

token_entropy_max.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

token_ambiguity_top3.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

token_ambiguity_mean.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

token_ambiguity_max.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

hidden_cosine_mean.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

hidden_cosine_max.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

hidden_cosine_top3.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

hidden_norm_mean.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

hidden_norm_variability.implementation_note: Computed from the existing greedy generation trace; no extra model pass.

p_true.formula: p(No) / (p(Yes) + p(No)) under the fixed correctness prompt
p_true.implementation_note: One extra pass through the same checkpoint.

semantic_disagreement_3.formula: mean of three pairwise normalized p(No) same-answer judgments
semantic_disagreement_3.implementation_note: Three generations plus three same-model judge passes.

lexical_disagreement_3.formula: mean over pairs of 1 − Jaccard(normalized word-token sets)

discrete_semantic_entropy_3.implementation_note: Budget proxy: 3 samples and same-answer judgments, not the paper's 10-sample bidirectional-entailment setup.

trace_logistic_8.implementation_note: Eight fixed cheap features; calibration-only fit; no hyperparameter search.

trace_tree_depth2.formula: CART-style branches over eight fixed trace features; leaf wrong-rate is the risk
trace_tree_depth2.implementation_note: Maximum depth 2 and at least 20 calibration rows per leaf.

interpretation: This prospectively tests new-model transfer on an existing question set. It does not establish state of the art, a new-data replication, or factual verification. Model, prompt, labels, sampling budget, and split remain mandatory context.
